title: Suki's Moonlight Adventure
synopsis: When Suki's teddy bear goes missing at bedtime, she feels scared and sad. With the help of her diverse group of toys, she embarks on a brave moonlight adventure around her room to find Mr. Cuddles, learning that being brave doesn't mean not feeling scared.

pages.text: Suki felt scared when she couldn't find Mr. Cuddles, her favorite teddy bear. "Where is he?" she whispered, looking around her dark room. The moon shone bright through her window, making everything look different and mysterious.

illustration.description: A young Asian girl with black pigtails in pink pajamas standing in her moonlit bedroom, looking worried. Soft moonbeams stream through the window casting gentle shadows. Her room has scattered toys and an empty bed with rumpled blankets.
illustration.alt: Suki looking worried in her moonlit bedroom

pages.text: "Don't be sad, Suki!" said Rosita, her doll with curly brown hair. "We'll help you find Mr. Cuddles!" Marcus, her toy robot with bright blue lights, beeped happily. "Let's be brave together!" Even though Suki still felt a little scared, she smiled.

illustration.description: Suki crouched down talking to her diverse collection of toys including a Latina doll with curly hair, a blue robot with glowing lights, and other colorful toys arranged in a circle. Their faces are friendly and encouraging in the soft moonlight.
illustration.alt: Suki talking with her helpful toys

pages.text: They searched under the bed, behind the bookshelf, and in the toy chest. Finally, Suki found Mr. Cuddles hiding in her closet! "There you are!" she said happily, hugging him tight. She felt brave and proud. "Thank you, friends," Suki yawned, climbing into bed with Mr. Cuddles, no longer scared of the dark.

illustration.description: Suki joyfully hugging a brown teddy bear while sitting on her bed, surrounded by her diverse group of toy friends who look happy and proud. The room is peaceful with warm moonlight, and everything feels cozy and safe now.
illustration.alt: Suki happily reunited with Mr. Cuddles

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Suki feel when she couldn't find Mr. Cuddles?
questions.explanation: Suki felt scared and sad when she couldn't find her favorite teddy bear at bedtime.

questions.question: Who helped Suki look for Mr. Cuddles?
questions.explanation: Rosita the doll and Marcus the robot, along with her other toys, helped Suki search for Mr. Cuddles.

questions.question: Where did Suki find Mr. Cuddles?
questions.explanation: Suki found Mr. Cuddles hiding in her closet after searching many places.

questions.question: How did Suki feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: By the end, Suki felt happy, brave, and proud that she found her teddy bear with help from her friends.

pages.title: Complete Suki's Adventure
pages.instructions: Fill in the missing words to complete the story!
pages.text: Suki felt _____ when she couldn't find Mr. Cuddles. Her toy friends wanted to _____ her search. They looked everywhere until Suki found him in the _____!
